reasoning: The question asks whether the Kansas City Chiefs will win Super Bowl LX (played in Feb 2026, capping the 2025 NFL season). The market price provided on 2025-10-16 is 0.12. Ten days later (on the cutoff date of 2025-10-26), the expected value of the probability remains 0.12 (treating the market as an efficient martingale), as we cannot condition on unknown game outcomes or injuries in that window. The Chiefs are consistently a top contender with Patrick Mahomes, so a 12% probability correctly prices them as one of the elite favorites mid-season (typical favorites have odds around +600 to +800, or 11-14%).
